title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta describes Replit's mission to democratize software development through agentic building, where users can create code in natural language without prior programming experience. Replit selected Claude for its coding capabilities in early 2024 and has developed a partnership with Anthropic involving early research previews and coordinated model releases.
